hideHeader.description: When enabled, the page header is hidden entirely (useful for block-built pages)

headerType.description: Text = plain background. Image/Video = full-width media background with overlay.

headerSize.description: Controls the height of the header section

horizontalLayout.description: Side-by-side: title on the left, subtitle on the right

pretitle.description: Small label above the title (e.g. category or section name)

title.description: Overrides the page title. Leave blank to use the page title.

image.description: Background image (used when Header Type is set to Image)

video.description: Background video (used when Header Type is set to Video)
